title: 验证器：智能体正确工作的关键
full_text:
elvis on X: "Verifiers are a big deal.
Without good verifiers, /goal & /loop breaks a lot.
Anything out of distribution for an LLM, the agent will struggle to verify work correctly.
I think it's worth tuning your own verifiers and figuring out how to hook them up with your current agents." / X

discovery_record.discovery_title: 验证器：智能体正确工作的关键
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 验证器很重要。 没有好的验证器，/goal 和 /loop 经常出问题。 对于大语言模型而言，任何超出分布的内容，智能体都难以正确验证工作。 我认为值得调优你自己的验证器，并弄清楚如何将它们与你当前的智能体连接起来。

key_excerpts.text: 验证器很重要。 没有好的验证器，/goal 和 /loop 经常出问题。 对于大语言模型而言，任何超出分布的内容，智能体都难以正确验证工作。 我认为值得调优你自己的验证器，并弄清楚如何将它们与你当前的智能体连接起来。
elvis on X: "Verifiers are a big deal.
Without good verifiers, /goal & /loop breaks a lot.
Anything out of distribution for an LLM, the agent will struggle to verify work correctly.
I think it's worth tuning your own verifiers and figuring out how to hook them up with your current agents.
" / X Post Log in Sign up Post elvis @omarsar0 Verifiers are a big deal.
